meta.title: Convention compliance review — src (production)
meta.scope: src/ production (Core + Cli); Tests and obj/ excluded
meta.summary: The architecture backbone is sound; the highest-value fix is the null-forgiving ! on OpenXml, which can throw past the boundary catch. The rest are naming and null-as-absence idiom nits.

findings.title: Null-forgiving ! on OpenXml can throw NullReferenceException past the boundary catch
findings.convention: Boundary error policy — catch foreseeable exceptions at the boundary and wrap them in Result<_, Failure>.
findings.what: On a malformed workbook where sheet.Id / .Value is null, the null-forgiving ! yields a NullReferenceException. The surrounding catch filter (InvalidOperationException / IOException / FormatException / OpenXmlPackageException / XmlException / InvalidDataException) does not include NRE, so it escapes the boundary unwrapped.

annotations.label: NRE escapes
annotations.note: sheet.Id!.Value! throws NullReferenceException on a malformed workbook — NRE is not in the catch filter at line 126, so it leaves the boundary unwrapped.
(Row)reader.LoadCurrentElement()! — the same latent NRE past the same catch.

suggestion.summary: Guard the nullable explicitly and return None on absence instead of suppressing it with !.

findings.notes: Same latent gap in MitsuiParser.cs:24,32 (catch at :59-60) — fix both.

findings.title: Sucden prompt-parse models absence as bool + out sentinel — use Optional<DateOnly>
findings.convention: Honest, total signatures via our own Optional<T> — no null-as-absence, no partial functions, no exceptions-as-control-flow.
findings.what: Absence is modelled as bool + an out sentinel (prompt = default → 0001-01-01). Koch's identical concept already returns Optional<DateOnly> (ParsePrompt) — align to it.

annotations.label: sentinel
annotations.note: prompt = default writes 0001-01-01, which leaks to the caller as if it were a real date when no dd/mm/yy is found.

callers.name: ExtractPositions
callers.snippet: if (!TryPrompt(row, out var prompt)) continue;   // only dated data rows

suggestion.summary: Return Optional<DateOnly> (ReadPrompt) and pattern-match at the call site.
suggestion.before: private static bool TryPrompt(PageRow row, out DateOnly prompt)
suggestion.callerBefore: if (!TryPrompt(row, out var prompt)) continue;   // only dated data rows

findings.notes: Mirror KochParser.ParsePrompt (KochParser.cs:136), which already returns Optional<DateOnly>.

findings.title: Public ColumnAt is a bare noun — the verb rule wants ClassifyColumn / ResolveColumn
findings.convention: Functions are actions — name them with a verb … never a bare noun (Fingerprint, Sides, BandValue). …At is not an exempt idiom (only Is/Has/Can and Parse/ToX/FromX).
findings.what: A public engine method named as a noun. It classifies an x-coordinate into a column, so a verb (ClassifyColumn / ResolveColumn) fits the Find…/Read…/Resolve… vocabulary the parsers already use.

annotations.label: noun
annotations.note: ColumnAt reads as a thing, not an action — rename to a verb.

suggestion.summary: Rename to a verb and update every call site in one sweep.
suggestion.before: public static Column ColumnAt(double left, double longX, double shortX, double netX, double promptX)
suggestion.after: public static Column ClassifyColumn(double left, double longX, double shortX, double netX, double promptX)

findings.notes: Public API — every PDF parser that bands columns calls it; rename all sites together.

judgmentCalls.title: ValidatedFolder.Create is internal static, not a single-minter
judgmentCalls.detail: The compile-time "reconcile before validation" guarantee holds across the assembly boundary (Cli cannot mint one), but intra-Core it is convention-enforced rather than type-enforced.
judgmentCalls.recommendation: Accept as-is; if a single-minter guarantee is wanted, nest a construction token only PreFlight holds.

judgmentCalls.title: Reconciler.ClassifyVerdict has a defensive throw for an unreachable both-None case
judgmentCalls.detail: The input (Optional<Agg>, Optional<Agg>) makes the both-None case representable, so the switch is partial and guarded at runtime rather than made unrepresentable.
judgmentCalls.recommendation: Low priority; optionally feed a SheetOnly | ReportOnly | Both carrier DU built while walking the key union, making the switch total.

nonFindings.title: Numbers.ParseSigned returns decimal? (not Optional<decimal>)
nonFindings.why: Deliberately kept 2026-06-30 — a value-type numeric-parse primitive in the broker-agnostic Pdf engine, not a domain/reference signature; converting would make the blessed AmtParser consumption pattern clunkier.

nonFindings.title: Severity has only Warning | Info, not Blocking | Warning | Info
nonFindings.why: Governed by "add a case only when the app branches on it" — blocking is a separate terminal outcome (PreflightOutcome.Blocked); no Note is ever Blocking.

clean.note: add-a-broker = folder + one registry line; no shared switch or classifier.
no broker slice imports a sibling slice (grep-verified).
private ctor + internal static Create minted only by PreFlight; reconcile-before-validation won't compile.
Pipeline.Run composes Result-returning steps, short-circuits on first blocking error, no app-state object.
RunCore returns Effect.WriteReport; the impure edge Matches and executes it.
new Result<>.Ok/.Error, Optional.Some/None helpers, explicit Match<T> type args used throughout.
